categoryUrls.title: G2 category URLs
categoryUrls.description: One or more G2.com category URLs to crawl, e.g. https://www.g2.com/categories/crm

maxItems.title: Max products
maxItems.description: Maximum number of products to save to the dataset across all categories.

usOnly.title: US vendors only
usOnly.description: If true, skip products whose vendor headquarters are not detected as US.

minRating.title: Minimum G2 rating
minRating.description: Skip products rated below this (0–5). Set to 0 to disable.

marketSegment.title: Primary market segment
marketSegment.description: Only keep products where the chosen segment makes up 30%+ of reviews.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Residential US proxies strongly recommended for G2.
